user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the exit HR checklist for departing employees with their contact and class details, so that I can manage HR offboarding tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit HR Checklist screen; When the list loads; Then each employee shows name, position level, email, contact number, employee class, and status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to submit an employee's HR checklist via the Task column, so that their offboarding can progress
acceptance_criteria: Given an employee has status Pending for Submission; When I open its Task and complete the checklist; Then the checklist is submitted and the status updates

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the exit HR checklist, so that I can review all pending employees with up to date data
acceptance_criteria: Given the checklist spans multiple pages; When I use pagination or click Refresh; Then the current set of employees is displayed
